gtc.app.name: gtc
gtc.cmd.doctor.about: Check that required Greentic binaries are available in PATH.
gtc.cmd.install.about: Install Greentic tools and optionally tenant-authorized artifacts.
gtc.cmd.release_cache.about: Export or import portable Greentic release caches.
gtc.cmd.release_cache.export.about: Export a release cache archive for air-gapped environments.
gtc.cmd.release_cache.import.about: Import a release cache archive into the local distributor cache.
gtc.cmd.setup.about: Pass through to greentic-setup (bundle lifecycle management).
gtc.cmd.start.about: Start a bundle from local or remote reference.
gtc.cmd.stop.about: Stop a bundle runtime or destroy a deployed environment.
gtc.cmd.add_admin.about: Register an admin client certificate identity for a local bundle.
gtc.cmd.remove_admin.about: Remove an admin client certificate identity from a local bundle.
gtc.cmd.admin.tunnel.about: Open an AWS Session Manager tunnel to the admin API of a deployed bundle.
gtc.arg.locale.help: UI locale for gtc help/output (BCP-47 tag).
gtc.arg.debug_router.help: Print resolved binary and args to stderr before exec.
gtc.help.usage.heading: Usage:
gtc.help.commands.heading: Commands
gtc.help.arguments.heading: Arguments
gtc.help.options.heading: Options
gtc.help.subcommand.about: Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)
gtc.help.subcommand.arg.command.help: Command path to show help for.
gtc.arg.key.help: Authorization key for the specified tenant.
gtc.arg.install.channel.help: Toolchain release channel to install (default: stable).
gtc.arg.install.release.help: Pinned Greentic toolchain release to install.
gtc.arg.install.manifest.help: Local Greentic toolchain manifest JSON to install.
gtc.arg.install.force.help: Reinstall even if the resolved toolchain digest is already installed.
gtc.arg.install.dry_run.help: Print planned toolchain install actions without executing them.
gtc.arg.install.binaries_only.help: Install only toolchain binaries unless combined with another install selector.
gtc.arg.install.packs_only.help: Install only release extension packs unless combined with another install selector.
gtc.arg.install.components_only.help: Install only release components unless combined with another install selector.
gtc.arg.install.tenant_only.help: Install only tenant-authorized artifacts unless combined with another install selector.
gtc.arg.release_cache.channel.help: Release channel for the exported cache.
gtc.arg.release_cache.output.help: Path to write the release cache tar.gz archive.
gtc.arg.release_cache.input.help: Path to the release cache tar.gz archive to import.
gtc.arg.bundle_ref.help: Bundle path/ref: local path, file://, oci://, repo://, store://
gtc.arg.add_admin.cn.help: Client certificate Common Name allowed to access the admin API.
gtc.arg.add_admin.public_key_file.help: PEM/OpenSSH public key file for this admin.
gtc.arg.remove_admin.cn.help: Client certificate Common Name to remove.
gtc.arg.admin.tunnel.target.help: Cloud provider for the admin tunnel.
gtc.arg.admin.tunnel.local_port.help: Local port to bind for the admin tunnel.
gtc.arg.admin.tunnel.container.help: Container name inside the ECS task.
gtc.arg.deploy_bundle_source.help: Override the remote bundle source passed to cloud deployers (for example https://.../bundle.gtbundle).
gtc.arg.deploy_refresh_cloud.help: Cloud provider (auto-detected from deploy state if omitted)
gtc.arg.deploy_refresh_environment.help: Environment name used during the original deploy
gtc.arg.upload_bundle.help: Upload local bundle to cloud storage and use as --deploy-bundle-source. Mutually exclusive with --deploy-bundle-source. Schemes: s3://, gs://, https://*.blob.core.windows.net/
gtc.arg.upload_bundle_presign_expires.he: Presigned URL expiry in seconds (S3 hard-caps at 604800 = 7 days)
gtc.cmd.deploy.about: Manage cloud deploys (refresh URLs, status, etc.)
gtc.cmd.deploy_refresh_bundle_url.about: Re-issue a fresh presigned URL for an already-uploaded bundle and re-apply terraform.
gtc.err.bin_missing_setup: greentic-setup not found in PATH. Install with: cargo install greentic-setup
gtc.err.key_required: A key is required for tenant installs.
gtc.install.using_env_key: Using tenant key from environment variable {env}.
gtc.install.toolchain.up_to_date: Greentic toolchain is already up to date.
gtc.install.toolchain.dry_run: Dry run: planned toolchain install commands.
gtc.install.toolchain.state_write_failed: Failed to write installed toolchain state.
gtc.install.summary_failed: Tenant artifact installation completed with failures.
gtc.cmd.update.about: Force-update all Greentic companion binaries to the latest 0.4.x version.
gtc.update.binstall_missing: cargo-binstall is not installed. Run `gtc install` first.
gtc.start.err.deploy_failed: failed to deploy bundle before start
gtc.stop.err.runtime_destroy_unsupported: --destroy is not supported for runtime target
gtc.stop.err.destroy_required: deployed targets currently require --destroy; stop without destroy is not implemented
gtc.wizard.title: Greentic Developer Wizard
gtc.cmd.up.about: Create, set up and start a bundle in one command.
gtc.cmd.up.after_help: Runs install -> wizard -> setup -> start as one command, ending in a foreground server (Ctrl+C to stop). Both answer documents are required; `up` never guesses the second one. Setup flags (--tenant, --team, --env, --advanced) are NOT forwarded — run the four commands separately if you need them. Everything after `--` is forwarded to the start step.
gtc.arg.up.answers.help: Create-answers document for the wizard step. Accepts local paths, file://, http://, https://, oci://, store:// and repo:// JSON documents.
gtc.arg.up.setup_answers.help: Setup-answers document for the setup step; same sources as --answers.
gtc.arg.up.bundle_dir.help: Override the bundle directory predicted from the create-answers document.
gtc.arg.up.no_install.help: Skip the install step; fail later if the toolchain is missing.
gtc.arg.up.no_start.help: Stop after setup and print the start command instead of running it.
gtc.arg.up.dry_run.help: Print the resolved bundle directory and every step, then exit without running any of them.
gtc.arg.up.force.help: Proceed even when the bundle directory already exists. Overwrites it; only safe when nothing is running against it.
gtc.arg.up.start_args.help: Arguments after `--`, forwarded verbatim to the start step.
